label: gitweeklytracker
title: Weekly git activity, without spreadsheets
subtitle: Point it at repos and author emails. Get commits, churn, streaks, and a Markdown report.
end_body: One Bash script. Local repos only. Markdown output ready for a weekly update.

clips.label: Scope
clips.caption_body: Use author emails and repo paths so the report never wanders into unrelated work.

clips.label: Generate
clips.caption_body: Terminal output groups activity by author, repo, insertions, deletions, and daily rhythm.

clips.label: Markdown
clips.caption_title: A Markdown report lands beside the run
clips.caption_body: The same data becomes a shareable weekly-report file with repo tables and summaries.

clips.label: Evidence
clips.caption_title: The useful details are already pulled out
clips.caption_body: Top changed files and day-by-day activity make the weekly narrative easy to write.
